About Me

Crafting Digital
Experiences

I'm a passionate UI/UX designer with over four years of experience crafting intuitive and visually engaging digital products.

Throughout my career, I've collaborated with diverse clients — from startups to established companies and agencies — delivering impactful design solutions across industries like e-commerce, finance, loyalty systems, and technology.

I thrive in cross-functional teams, bringing a user-centered mindset to every phase of the design process — from research and wireframing to high-fidelity prototypes.
